'''maduzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyphos|kyphos]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyphos|kyphos]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| maduzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mædizhith|mædizhith]] || [[word:mædizhij|mædizhij]] || [[word:mædizhish|mædizhish]] || [[word:mædizhi|mædizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:maduduzhuth|maduduzhuth]] || [[word:maduduzhuj|maduduzhuj]] || [[word:maduduzhush|maduduzhush]] || [[word:maduduzhu|maduduzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:maduzhuth|maduzhuth]] || [[word:maduzhuj|maduzhuj]] || [[word:maduzhush|maduzhush]] || [[word:maduzhu|maduzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:madufzhuth|madufzhuth]] || [[word:madufzhuj|madufzhuj]] || [[word:madufzhush|madufzhush]] || [[word:madufzhuf|madufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:maduzhuthu|maduzhuthu]] || [[word:maduzhuju|maduzhuju]] || [[word:maduzhushu|maduzhushu]] || [[word:maduzhuku|maduzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:maduzhuth|maduzhuth]] || [[word:maduzhuj|maduzhuj]] || [[word:maduzhush|maduzhush]] || [[word:maduzhu|maduzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:maduzhuthul|maduzhuthul]] || [[word:maduzhujul|maduzhujul]] || [[word:maduzhushul|maduzhushul]] || [[word:maduzhukul|maduzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:maduzhuthuthu|maduzhuthuthu]] || [[word:maduzhujuju|maduzhujuju]] || [[word:maduzhushushu|maduzhushushu]] || [[word:maduzhuku|maduzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:maduzhuthun|maduzhuthun]] || [[word:maduzhujun|maduzhujun]] || [[word:maduzhushun|maduzhushun]] || [[word:maduzhukun|maduzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:maduzhuthuoro|maduzhuthuoro]] || [[word:maduzhujuoro|maduzhujuoro]] || [[word:maduzhushuoro|maduzhushuoro]] || [[word:maduzhukuoro|maduzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
